category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts websites into eBooks and Markdown.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Papeer site.
display_name_sources: Official homepage domain and GitHub repository use the name papeer/Papeer.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official product site and best official documentation surface available.
source_facts.repo is the official GitHub project whose README is an official documentation fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/lapwat/papeer; per instructions, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Chrome Web Store listing for Papeer references papeer.tech account/API setup for e-reader workflows.
